operations.quirks: 3 noise violations in 2 years = permanent ban. $5M insurance required. Stage 2 aircraft voluntarily banned.
Nighttime fee (23:00-07:00): $577 per op for >12,500 lbs. Doubles after 5th operation/year to $1,154. Touch-and-go banned 23:00-07:00.
Armed Security Officer required ($1,100/day). Passenger manifest 24hrs prior. TSA screening at gateway airport. Max $5,000 noise penalty.
operations.permitNotes: DASSP (DCA Access Standard Security Program) mandatory

operations.quirks: No high-power engine run-ups 22:00-07:00. Short runway (6,001 ft) limits heavy jets.
World's busiest GA airport. No touch-and-go 21:00-07:00. Non-Stage 3 curfew 22:00-07:00.
Busiest single-runway commercial airport in US. Steep approach over downtown.
During major events (Super Bowl, F1, CES): mandatory slots + PPR. Event fees $750-$3,000. File 4hrs+ in advance. ~1,000 bizjets for Super Bowl 2024.
Major intl fuel stop. Written PPR 24-48hrs for foreign refuel stops. De-icing essential Oct-Apr. USDA/APHIS inspection. Winter: ~5.5hrs daylight (Dec).
GA <2% of traffic. Higher fees than TEB/HPN alternatives. Single FBO at Building 145.
Stage 3 minimum for nighttime ops (23:00-07:00). PPR when active = max 2 days parking.

operations.customsLocation: Separate FIS facility - pax taxi to FIS
operations.quirks: Seasonal congestion during Art Basel, Super Bowl, snowbird season. FIS separate from FBO.
All noise abatement voluntary (post-ANCA). Elevation 5,885 ft MSL creates significant density altitude effects. No on-airport customs.
GA tiny fraction of ~2,500 movements/day. Better alternatives: KPWK (Chicago Executive), KDPA (DuPage).
Customs requires 48hr advance notice + prepaid user fee online. PPR for 75,001-100,000 lbs. Max wingspan 100 ft.
CBP requires 2 weeks advance notice for aircraft from south of border. Most GA use KSDL or KDVT instead.
No PPR for private flights. Mandatory security search by crew (captain signs form). Paris Air Show: 1/3 ramp reserved. Charter limited to ≤25 seats.
operations.permitNotes: Only for non-EU charter flights

operations.operatingNotes: Mon-Fri 07:00-22:00; Sat-Sun 08:00-20:00. Closed Christmas/Boxing Day. No overtime.
operations.quirks: UK's only dedicated bizav airport. Cap ~28,000 ops/year. Stage 4 required. Chapter 2 banned. Size limit BBJ2. Closes FIRMLY at published times.
operations.permitNotes: UK GAR mandatory for intl flights

operations.quirks: Near-impossible for GA. Slots traded for $60-75M. Request 3+ months advance. Windsor Suite: £3,000/charter. UK TCO cert required post-Brexit.

operations.curfewExceptions: Jun 1-Sep 30: No ad hoc GA 22:00-05:59 UTC
operations.quirks: Most expensive London parking (>$2,000/night large-cabin). Fuel ~37% higher than Stansted.
Best value London option. Only 10 GA night slots/week 22:00-05:59 UTC. Planeside pickup allowed. No luggage screening <45 tons Part 91.
operations.permitNotes: UK GAR mandatory (£10K fine). UK ETA from Feb 25, 2026

operations.quirks: 5 noise categories for jets. Noise charges CHF 15.4M (2023). Proposals to triple post-11pm surcharges. Email notifications for track deviations.
Cannot request slots >5 days advance. ICAO Chapter 4 required 22:00-06:00. Extreme congestion during WEF, UN sessions, ski season.
GA cap 12,000/year (down from 17,000). GA prohibited 22:00-06:00. €29.05/pax tax. Noise levy €104.50/landing. 87 aircraft types banned.

operations.parkingNotes: 3 hour max during peak events. Parking escalates exponentially.
operations.quirks: Europe's most congested bizav gateway in summer. Fuel shortages on weekends. APU restrictions strict. Cannes/Monaco: modifying times = back of queue.
QC >8 aircraft forbidden 22:00-04:59. Severe slot violation penalties include imprisonment.

operations.parkingNotes: No hangars. Summer: wingspan >21.4m = 24hr turnaround. Reposition to Pescara/Rimini/Bologna when full.
operations.quirks: PPR 24/7 - confirmation # in flight plan. All GA to Rome MUST use Ciampino during ops hours.
NOT a transit airport - non-EU = full clearance. Recent massive parking fee increases: 50-ton 3 days = €3,180. 2026 Winter Olympics disruption Feb 6-22.
Convenient for northern Italy. Less congested than Milan airports.
Never closed for snow in 50+ years. World-class winter ops. De-icing Oct-Mar (sometimes Jun).
De-icing mid-Oct through Mar (sometimes Jun). Fluid rated -34°C. 4 trucks simultaneously per aircraft. 2 de-icing areas (5 aircraft each).
280 winter maintenance personnel. World's largest PSB vehicles. Expert winter operations.
Scandinavia's busiest airport. No curfew. Excellent winter capability.

operations.parkingNotes: Free parking limited to 2 hours (down from 8-12)
operations.quirks: NEW Level 2 slots Mar 2025. >5,700kg = mandatory slots (incl VFR). Slots confirmed day before only. Greek islands: €2,000/leg lounge fee.
Major European hub. Dedicated GA terminal. Slot-coordinated.
Busy during Mobile World Congress, F1 Spanish GP. Slot-coordinated.
70-75% bizav shifted to OMDW (Dubai World Central). Tech stops take longer. Fuel delays. OMAA/OBBI preferred for tech stops.
operations.permitNotes: $115 non-refundable fee. Often 12-48hrs (UAE CAA 24/7)

operations.quirks: Easiest ME permit. Only needs cert of airworthiness. No slots/PPR. Permits valid +72hrs, easy revisions. Al Bateen (OMAD) = dedicated bizav.
operations.permitNotes: Simplest in region - just airworthiness cert

operations.quirks: Min 72hr (Universal: 3 weeks). Must provide FLs. Overflight ALWAYS required ($30). Hajj = special slot. Crew visas need sponsor (3 weeks). Halal catering 24-48hr. No alcohol.
operations.permitNotes: Sponsor letter mandatory. Must provide flight levels.

operations.quirks: Same requirements as OEJN. Prohibits tech stops and ICAO Code F aircraft. Fuel $3.61-$3.68/USG.
operations.permitNotes: Same as Jeddah - sponsor mandatory

operations.quirks: Local sponsor REQUIRED. Sponsor must send request directly to Qatar CAA (cannot be operator/3rd-party).
operations.permitNotes: Sponsor must have personal knowledge of all pax

operations.quirks: Most complex ME permit. 72-96hrs. Requires: 10yr pilot employment history, full pax passports, sponsor w/personal pax knowledge (Israeli ID/passport/license). GA overflight NOT permitted - must land. ASOC-approved departure airport only.
operations.permitNotes: Sponsor mandatory. Comprehensive security checks. Overflight prohibited.

operations.quirks: High-threat environment. Extensive security protocols. Advance coordination essential.
operations.permitNotes: Security clearances required. Extended lead time.

operations.quirks: Permits typically 5-7 working days. Overflight permits required for Kuwaiti airspace.
Good tech stop location. Competitive fuel prices. Permits 3-5 working days.
Popular tech stop. Permits 3-5 days. Good alternative to Dubai for positioning.
3-5 working days via SA DOT/SACAA. CAA Mon-Fri 08:00-16:00 ONLY - no weekend processing. 'A mess' - last-minute denials. Weekend changes = grounded until Monday. FOP (8+ pax): 21+ days.
operations.permitNotes: SACAA Mon-Fri only. Weekend schedule changes ground aircraft.

operations.quirks: Same permit issues as FACT. Lanseria (FALA) nearby - no PPR/slots for GA (recommended).

Kenya CAA online but closed weekends w/no backup. Reportedly ONE person processes permits (including medical emergencies). Known fuel availability issues (NOTAMs issued). Elevation 5,327 ft affects performance.
operations.permitNotes: CAA closed weekends - no processing

operations.quirks: Permits 3-5 working days. Level 2 slots (24hrs advance). Overflight permits 4 business days (CAA hours 08:00-12:00 UTC only). Military airspace restrictions.
operations.permitNotes: Overflight: 4 days, CAA 08:00-12:00 UTC only

operations.quirks: Feb 2026 Terminal 1 fire disrupted AIS/AFTN. Customs crackdowns on unpaid import duties (60+ jets grounded). Verify fuel quality/availability. 3rd-largest private aviation sector in Africa.
Capital city airport. Similar permit requirements to Lagos. 7-day lead time typical.
Major North African hub. Good tech stop for trans-Atlantic. Permits 5 working days.
Africa's busiest GA airport. Domestic/regional ops. Short runway (4,948 ft). No customs - use HKJK for international.
Coastal hub. Popular safari/leisure destination gateway. Same Kenya CAA permit issues as HKJK.
Med tech stop. Permits typically 5-7 working days via Tunisian CAA.

Min 3 business days for permits. Aircraft must be in CAAC 'Preflight' system 5 working days before permit app. Sponsor letter mandatory (Chinese, company letterhead, chop). Max 2 revisions post-approval. $3,000 CAAC compensation fee per entry. Apr 1, 2026: prepaid ATC or LOC mandatory. Tourism flights prohibited. Bizjets banned 07:00-09:00 local. 08:00-22:00 = 1 movement max per aircraft.
operations.permitNotes: Sponsor letter w/chop mandatory. 5-day Preflight registration. $3K fee. Max 2 revisions.

operations.quirks: Same complex requirements as ZBAA. C-type crew visas (VOA for Shanghai but NOT US nationals + 10 others). Restricted airways L888, Y1, Y2, Y3 unavailable to GA. China/Mongolia use meters not feet for altitude.
operations.permitNotes: Same as Beijing - sponsor mandatory, Preflight registration, fees

operations.parkingNotes: 2-5 days max. May need to reposition to Narita for longer stays.
operations.quirks: Private flights (ICAO-registered) = no landing permit. Charter = 3 days. No formal curfew for GA but 16 slots/day limit (06:00-23:00). VIP CIQ ~$2,200/use. Refueling w/pax onboard PROHIBITED (all Japan airports).
operations.permitNotes: Private non-revenue = no permit. Charter = 3 days.

operations.quirks: Operates 06:00-22:59 strict overnight curfew. No Western-style FBOs - GA parks on general ramps. Same Japan rules: no pax refueling, VIP CIQ fees.
operations.permitNotes: Private = no permit. Charter = 3 days.

operations.parkingNotes: 14 days max (historically 2 days). Macau (VMMC) used as parking alternate.
operations.quirks: Permits for private/charter via HKCAD 3 working days (2 weeks for new ops). Slots EXTREMELY scarce - some days NO GA slots. Night slots (22:00-06:59): 6/night max. Missed slots = formal CAA letter, potential blacklist. HKBAC monopoly. Fuel only via HKBAC at premium.
operations.permitNotes: 2 weeks for new operators. Strict slot compliance.

operations.quirks: Most GA prefers Seletar (WSSL). During events like Singapore Airshow, GA may be denied at Changi entirely.

operations.customsLocation: Business Aviation Centre (1 movement at a time - expect delays)
operations.quirks: Preferred for GA ops. Runway 6,024 ft handles up to B757-200 size. IS-BAH accredited. Fuel hours: Mon-Fri 07:30-22:00; Sat-Sun 08:30-17:30 (overtime charges after-hours). CIQ at BAC = 1 aircraft at a time.

Non-scheduled flights = DGCA/CCA permits. Standard: 3 working days (op on 4th day). Prior Reference Countries (China, Pakistan, Afghanistan, etc): 7 working days. Overflight: 48hrs min. GA apron limited. Customs = document-driven (incomplete paperwork = delays/fines). Private aircraft personal use: up to 40% GST.
operations.permitNotes: 7 days for Prior Reference Countries. Overflight: 48hrs.

operations.quirks: Same India permit requirements. GA apron space limited. Slot-coordinated.

operations.curfewExceptions: Curfew-exempt: ≤34,000kg MTOW at DEPARTURE point (not landing weight)
operations.quirks: Sydney Airport Curfew Act 1995 (legislated). G650/Global Express may NOT qualify for curfew ops when carrying significant fuel. Movement cap: 80/hour. Mandatory aircraft disinsection (4 methods). Strict DAFF biosecurity - declare all food/plants/animals.
operations.permitNotes: Arrival outside working hours: 5 days advance. Non-approved airport: 10 days.

operations.quirks: Place of First Arrival approval required. After-hours/outside-approved-airport: 5 working days. Non-approved airports: 10 working days. Mandatory disinsection (all aircraft). MPI biosecurity clearance before pax/crew deplane. Crew must remain onboard until clearance.
operations.permitNotes: POFA approval required. 10 days for non-approved airports.

operations.quirks: Popular intl entry point for northern Australia. Mandatory disinsection. DAFF biosecurity inspections.
Gateway to Western Australia. Mandatory disinsection. Good tech stop for Asia-Australia routing.
Commercial airport. Don Mueang (VTBD) strongly preferred for GA - has MJets private terminal (IS-BAO/IS-BAH). VTBD consistently lowest fuel in region.
PREFERRED Bangkok airport for GA. MJets private terminal = IS-BAO/IS-BAH accredited. Consistently lowest fuel prices in region. Royal Thai Air Force base (shared civilian/military).
Major leisure destination. Seasonal congestion Dec-Feb. Permits 3-5 working days.
Good tech stop. Sultan Abdul Aziz Shah (WMSA/Subang) nearby = dedicated GA airport (preferred for overnight/longer stays).
Permits 5-7 working days. Overflight permits also required. Document-heavy customs process.
Heavily slot-constrained. Permits 5-7 working days. Clark (RPLC) 50nm north = good GA alternative.
Popular leisure destination. World's busiest single-runway airport (domestic traffic). Permits 3-5 working days.
Gimpo (RKSS) closer to Seoul but domestic-focused. Permits 3-5 working days.
Permits 7-10 working days. Visa requirements strict. Overflight permits also required.
Same Vietnam permit requirements. Capital city airport. 7-10 working day permits.
Good Indian Ocean tech stop. Permits 5-7 working days. Ratmalana (VCCC) = secondary GA airport closer to city.
Permits 7-10 working days (Pakistan = Prior Reference Country for India). Security requirements strict. Overflight permits required.
operations.permitNotes: Prior Reference Country - extended timelines
